description_long: This is a sleek, modern military-style airplane with a streamlined gray fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The wings are mid-mounted and feature red tips and blue accent markings, giving the aircraft a distinctive appearance. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a blue-tinted canopy, suggesting a single or dual-seat configuration. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, both with red tips. The engine appears to be integrated into the rear fuselage, with a prominent exhaust at the back. The overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and speed, typical of a jet-powered aircraft.
description: A modern gray military-style jet airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, red and blue accents, and a blue-tinted forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the streamlined fuselage, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with red tips.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the mid-mounted wings, red and blue markings, and the overall planform of the airplane.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit, wing sweep, and tail configuration with red-tipped stabilizers.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the single engine exhaust, tail assembly, and the full span of the wings with colored tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings, no visible winglets, and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; likely retractable landing gear based on design, but not shown in images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy, likely single or dual-seat.
